title: Glo Pals Original Water-Activated Light-up Sensory Bath Toy - Party Pal - White. 4 Reusable Light-Up Cubes. Colourful Bath Time Fun. Childrens Light-up Sensory Play. Gift Suitable for Boys & Girls 3+
features: 🟧 WATER-ACTIVATED LIGHT UP BATH TOY - Add a calming glow to playtime or bath time with these cute characters whose colourful faces glow in water! Each charming character comes with their own personality features and there are six to collect. Automatically Turns Off When Fully Dry
💡 SENSORY BATH TOY - Upon contact with water the individual cubes glow and emit a soft colourful light, ideal for creating a calming, sensory atmosphere either in the bath or during playtimes.
🟧 GLO PALS CUBES - Each pack contains four colourful cubes, which can be used with a Glo Pal character (sold separately) or on their own as they float around with their happy smiling faces.
💡 AUTOMATICALLY TURNS OFF WHEN DRY - The lights will stop glowing once removed from the water however for the best use simply give them a quick wipe dry to preserve the battery for next time.
🟧 3 YEARS & OVER – This sensory bath toy is suitable for children 3 years and above
description: Product Description Glo Pals Original Water-Activated Light-up Sensory Bath Toy Water activated light-up sensory bath toy Bring a splash of magic to bath time or water play with these delightful Edushape Glow Cubes! Each colourful cube features a cheerful, smiling face that lights up when it touches water, creating a gentle, calming glow that your little one will love. Perfect for adding a sensory element to playtime, the cubes can float freely in the bath or be paired with a Glo Pal character (sold separately) for even more glowing fun. How do you turn off Glo Pals light-up cubes? The soft, colourful lights turn off when removed from water, but a quick wipe dry keeps the cubes ready for their next sparkling adventure. With four charming cubes in each set, your child can explore, stack, and float them for endless interactive play. Why Parents Love Glo Pals Calming glow promotes visual sensory stimulation Encourages bath time confidence and emotional regulation Inspires storytelling and creative character play Easy to use – turns on in water, off when dry Includes 4 light-up cubes (made from recycled plastic) Key Features & Benefits Four colourful cubes with happy, glowing faces Activate when in contact with water for a calming, sensory effect Soft, cheerful glow perfect for imaginative water play Turns off automatically when removed from water. The cubes battery lasts for approximately 16 hours Lights up with a calming glow when placed in water. Four colourful cubes with happy, glowing faces Soft, cheerful glow perfect for imaginative water play Turns off automatically when removed from water. Sensory Support at Bath Time or Beyond Whether it’s part of a wind-down routine , sensory tray , or water table play , Glo Pals support visual sensory input and encourage a positive association with water-based activities. When removed from water, the cube powers off automatically.
